author: Sabelo Nsele
text: US President Donald Trump UMENGAMELI waseMelika, uMnuz Donald Trump Image: Mandel Ngan / AFP ZIFINYELELE kwangqingetshe izingxoxo zamazwe amabili alwayo, iMelika ne-Iran. La mazwe ahlulekile ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni sokuqeda impi emva kwezingxoxo ezidonse amahora awu-21. Izingxoxo ziqale emva kokuba womabili la mazwe evumelane ngokubeka phansi izikhali kuze kube amasonto amabili. Bekunethemba lokuthi izingxoxo zizoholela ekupheleni kwempi eqale ngenyanga eyedlule kepha izolo, iMelika imemezele ungqingetshe ezingxoxweni ezibanjelwe ezweni iPakistan. IPhini likaMengameli waseMelika, uMnuz JD Vance, lithe banqume ukubuyela eMelika emva kukofinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo. "Senze isiphakamiso sokugcina kubona, bangavumelana naso. Kube sekusicacela ukuthi ayikho into esisayihlalele ePakistan, sanquma ukuthi ababuyele ekhaya labo abebesimele ezingxoxweni." UVance akazange afune ukuchaza ukuthi ikuphi lokhu i-Iran engafunanga ukuvumelana nakho. Abaholi base-Iran bathe bazibophezele ezingxoxweni. Bathe iMelika isheshe yaphonsa ithawula ezingxoxweni njengoba bekungokokuqala eminyakeni engu-40, ukuba kube nezingxoxo phakathi kwabaholi bamazwe. Akucaci ukuthi ukufinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo kusibekaphi isivumelwano sala mazwe sokumisa impi. Amazwe omhlaba abambe umoya ngale mpi eholele ekunyukeni kukawoyela emhlabeni wonke jikelele. Intego kawoyela inyuke kakhulu emva kokuqubuka kwempi ngenyanga eyedlule. Ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela kuholele ekunyukeni kukaphethroli emazweni amaningi. Lapha eNingizimu Afrika uphethroli unyuke ngo-R3.06 kwathi udizili wona wanyuka ngo-R7.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMMELI kaNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo, ecaleni lezibhelu zango-2021 Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media ISAZI sezomthetho wokusetshenziswa kwezinkundla zokuxhumana, uNkk Emma Sadleir, simile ekutheni indodakazi yomholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, yayilokhu iyiphehlile eyodweshu ngesikhathi sezibhelu zango-2021. Sikusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi sifakaza eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, lapho ummeli kaNkk Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, ekhale ngokuthi lo ngoti ufakaza ngaphandle kombiko ofanele, obizwa ngokuthi i-expert report. Lo ngoti ubehlonywa ngemibuzo ngobufakazi bakhe abethula phambilini, abuqoqa enkundleni yokuxhumana i-X, wase ebhala i-memorandum ngalokho akuthola. Wabe esenikezela ngombono wakhe ngokuziphatha kukaNkk Zuma-Sambudla. UNkk Sadleir utshele inkantolo ukuthi umqulu awusebenzisile ukwethula ngawo ubufakazi bakhe i-memorandum, akuwona umbiko (expert report). Uthe lokhu kwenzeka ngesizathu sokuthi abophiko loKlebe abeza kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi kudingeka acubungule okwakubhalwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, abazange babuye kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi ahlanganise lo mbiko ngoba uzoba wufakazi enkantolo. Uthe wathi uma esebizelwa enkantolo, waphoqeleka ukuthi athule ubufakazi bakhe esebenzisa ayekubhale kwi-memorandum. Uthe mabili amacala abophiko loKlebe ababethe bafuna abalekelele kuwo; elokuqala elalabo ababegqugquzela udlame besebenzisa inkundla yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, bese elesibili kube eliqondene nommangalelwa (uNkk Zuma-Sambudla). Uthe emva kokuhlanganisa i-memorandum yakhe eyayihambisana nombono wakhe wokuthi likhona icala okufanele aliphendule enkantolo ummangalelwa, wabe eseyihambisa kwabophiko loKlebe. Emphosa imibuzo uMpofu, uthe bashaya amakhala ngokwethula kwakhe ubufakazi ngaphandle kombiko wesazi (expert report). “Uyavuma kodwa ukuthi lo mqulu othule ngawo ubufakazi akuyona i-expert report kodwa yi-memorandum? Sizophakamisa ukuthi ubufakazi bakho buchithwe ngoba inkantolo ayikwazi ukulalela ubufakazi besazi ngaphandle kombiko,” kubeka uMpofu. UNkk Sadleir uphendule ngelithi ukuthi ubufakazi bakhe ubethule ngaphandle kombiko, abukuguquli ubuqiniso balokho akuthola njengesazi. Wengeze ngelithi ngisho ngabe wayewuhlanganisile umbiko uMpofu ambuza ngawo, wayezothatha khona lokhu akubhale kwi-memorandum, akunameke lapho ayezobhala khona umbiko. Uthe akazange asazi isizathu esenza oKlebe bangabe besabuyela kuyena ukuzomtshela ukuthi akahlanganise umbiko wesazi. Ecacisa ngokunye athi wakuthola, uthe kwakungama-tweet angu-2 uNkk Zuma-Sambudla awafaka ekhasini lakhe esikhathini esingamahora angu-36 kulandela ukuboshwa kukayise. Phakathi kwawo, uthe kwakukhona eyayithi “Siyanibona” (“we see you”), athe wayebalula izindawo ezehlukene lapho okwase kuqubuke khona udlame. UNkk Sadleir uthe ngokucubungula kwakhe, lokhu kwakukhombisa ukuthi ugqugquzela udlame, kukhombisa injabulo, ukuthakasela kanjalo nokubonga. Uthe ikhasi lomuntu ofana noNkk Zuma-Sambudla lithathwa njengelinomthelela kubantu njengoba linabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-360 000. Uveze nokuthi ungumuntu odumile, ozalwa owayengumengameli nakho okuba nomthelela ekutheni into ayishoyo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ilalelwe abantu abaningi. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwabonakala nangesibalo sabantu abaphinde bafaka ayekuphanyeke kule nkundla yakhe emakhasini abo. IJaji uMnuz Mbuzeni Mathenjwa, lilihlehlisele inamuhla icala, ukuze kulethwe ufakazi omusha. UNkk Zuma-Sambudla, ubeswenke econsa ngesudi yakhe emnyama, eshaye nezicathulo zakhe ezimnyama ezihambela phezulu. Ubebukeka ezikhululekele, kuthi uma kuthathwa ikhefu, abonakale exhawula abeMKP ebebezomeseka, aphinde athathe izithombe nalabo ebebefuna ukushutha naye. Phakathi kwabebezomeseka bekukhona noyilungu leMKP ePhalamende, uMnuz Vusi Shongwe.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa esebenzisa kwisivimbamgwaqo kuN12 eWestoria, eWest Rand Ibamba likaKhomishana wesiFundazwe saseGauteng, uMajor General Mbuso Khumalo, ujoyine umkhankaso wemikhakha eyahlukene yokuvimba umgwaqo u-N12 no-R28 eWestonaria, esifundeni saseWest Rand, eGauteng. Lo msebenzi ubuholwa nguKhomishana Wesifunda saseWest Rand, uMajor General Lorraine Challen uhlanganise  umnyango wezaseKhaya, amaphoyisa imigwaqo eGauteng, abezinkampqni zezokuphepha kanye nezinhlaka eziqapha emphakathini iCPF. Kuxwayiswa abashayeli ngokujabula bazibheke kuleli Phasika Ngesikhathi kusetshenzwa, kuboshwe abasolwa abayisithupha ngokuba sezweni ngokungemthetho kanti abanye abasolwa abayisithupha baboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa. Lo msebenzi uyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yokuqinisekisa ukuphepha komphakathi kanye nokuhambisana nomthetho ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika kulo lonke elaseGauteng. UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika. Unxuse abasebenzisa umgwaqo ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yomgwaqo, bagweme ukuphuza nokushayela, babeke eqhulwini ukuphepha ngaso sonke isikhathi. "Sinxusa imiphakathi ukuthi isebenzisane nabezomthetho ngokubika izenzo zobugebengu kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuthi imigubho iqhutshwa ngaphansi komthetho. Sonke asibambe iqhaza ekwenzeni leli Phasika libe yisikhathi esiphephile nesinokuthula kuwo wonke umuntu waseGauteng." UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI wezwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa IPHALAMENDE lichithe isicelo se-African Transformation Movement (ATM), sokuba kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa esikhundleni. I-ATM ibifuna ukuthi kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni emva kombiko wophiko olugada ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid, oluveze ukuthi abaqaphi bakaRamaphosa baphula imigomo ngesikhathi bephenya ngokuntshontshwa kwezindodla zemali epulazi likaRamaphosa. Umbiko we-Ipid osanda kunekelwa izwe, ukhombe ngenjumbane izikhulu ezazigada uRamaphosa ngesikhathi kuntshontshwa imali epulazini lakhe ngo-2021. IPhalamende lake lwaqala uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni ngo-2022, ngesikhathi kuvela izinsolo okukuqala. Nokho iPhalamende lachitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, okwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyula esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-ATM iyona eyayifake isicelo sokuthi kuqalwe uphenyo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni esachithwa. Emva kokudedelwa kombiko we-Ipid, i-ATM, iphinde yabhalela iPhalamende icela ukuthi kuvuswe lolu daba. USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, uthe iPhalamende livele selaqeda ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu empendulweni yencwadi ayithumele i-ATM. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuqala, wawufuna kuphenywe izinsolo ezifanayo. IPhalamende lanquma ukuqoka ithimba elalizophenya. Sekuwumlando ukuthi iPhalamende lanquma ukuchitha umbiko wethimba." UNkk Didiza uthe iPhalamende alikwazi ukubuye liqale phansi liphenye lezi zinsolo, ngaphandle uma kungaba nesinqumo senkantolo esiphoqa ukuthi kuqalwe phansi uphenyo. I-EFF yaphonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko wethimba eliholwa uNgcobo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kulindeleke ukuthi ikhiphe isinqumo sayo maduze. Umholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, uthe kuyabadumaza ukuchithwa kwesicelo sabo. UZungula uthe uNkk Didiza usebenzise izaba ukuchitha isicelo sabo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokulwela ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule ngodaba lwasePhala Phala.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Ayanda Ndamane / Independent Newspapers KWEMBULWE izipoki ezibhubhudla imali esikhwameni esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, i-National Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS), ekubeni kuvela ukuthi sezafa. Lezi zipoki zivundululwe embikweni kaMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, oveze ukuthi zingu-822 izipoki okutholakale ukuthi ziyahlomula kulesi sikhwama, ekubeni ulwazi lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya, luveza ukuthi zendela koyisemkhulu. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, useyalele abalesi sikhwama ukuthi baqale uphenyo. Uthe kumele basebenzisane nophiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-SIU ukuze kutholakale abenza lo mkhonyovu. "Umbiko uveza ukuthi lezi zipoki ziyaqhubeka nokuxhaswa yi-NSFAS ekubeni zingaphili ngokoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Asifuni ngomuso kube nento efuze le yingakho kumele kuphenywe." Uthe lo mbiko ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezevile ku-14 000, ezihlomula oxhasweni ngendlela engafanele. "Imindeni yalezi zitshudeni ihola imali engaphezu kwebekiwe ukuze uxhaswe. Kodwa nazo ziyaqhubeka nokuhlomula ngendlela engafanele." Uthe kuphinde kwatholwa nezitshudeni ezingu-321, ezihlomulayo ekubeni zihlomula nasesibonelelweni sabangasebenzi kuleli, esingu-R370 ngenyanga. "Konke lokhu uhlelo lwe-NSFAS luhlulekile ukukubika ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezithola uxhaso kungafanele. Okunye kunabaxhasiwe ekubeni bafeyila, ekubeni umgomo we-NSFAS uthi uma ufeyila uphucwa uxhaso." Uthe imali ye-NSFAS ihlinzekwa abadonsa kanzima, hhayi uwonke wonke ongamele ayithole. "Sifuna ukuqeda nya ngenkohlakalo nokudliwa kungafanele kwemali yabakhokhi bentela kuleli. Sethemba ukuthi uphenyo luzothola yonke into, sazi ukuthi ubani owenzeni." Uthe asikho isitshudeni esixhaswe ngendlela efanele okumele sitatazele ngenxa yalolu phenyo. Uqhube wathi bafuna ukubamba labo abaqamba amanga, abaletha ulwazi olungelona ngesikhathi befaka izicelo zoxhaso.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umndeni ka-Albert Mazibuko izolo obuhambele inkonzo yesikhumbuzo sakhe eCFCI eThekwini IZOQALA ngokungcwatshwa kuqala ngo-8 ekuseni, bese kulandela inkonzo yomngcwabo wayo ingwazi engasekho yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko (77), eshone ngeledlule esibhedlela, ngemuva kokugula isikhashana. Lokhu kuvezwe umfowabo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo ebiseCFCI eBerea eThekwini izolo. U-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe umfowabo wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, e-Estcourt. INDODANA ka-Albert Mazibuko uNhlanhla ogqoke isudi emnyama icula neqembu iLadysmith Black Mambazo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo izolo Uthe ngenxa yemithetho yakule ndawo okuzofihlwa kuyo, bahlele ukuthi ekuseni kuqale umngcwabo afihlwe bese kuthi ngo-9 kube nenkonzo ezoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, e-Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni. "Indawo azofihlwa kuyo inemithetho kakhulu, ngakho sizoqala ngokumfihla ekuseni bese kulandela inkonzo ezobe ihambisana nezikhulumi ezihlukene," kusho uMazibuko. Uthe umfowabo ubengumuntu onothando, nobexhasana kakhulu ezintweni abantu abazenzayo. "Ubenothando umfowethu, enomusa elungile futhi kakhulu. Ubengumuntu owesekanayo kunoma yini oyenzayo futhi ekwenza konke ngomoya owodwa. Wamxhasa uMshengu enza konke ayekusho njengoba inhloso kaMshengu kwakungukuthi umculo neqembu udume kuzona zonke izindawo, ngempela bakwenza lokho bebambene, kwaze kwaba uyakholwa uMshengu, bayihamba le ndlela naye wagcina ekholwa," kuchaza uMazibuko. ABEBEHAMBELE inkonzo yokukhumbula ingwazi yeMambazo u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media Ubonge ukuxhaswa abantu kulesi sikhathi esinzima, athe ukwesekwa abakutholile kubathobe kakhulu. U-Enos Phungula ongomunye wamalungu amadala aleli qembu, uthe kushayisa ngovalo ukuzokhuluma enkonzweni kaMazibuko, kodwa akujabulelayo wukuthi ulihambile ibanga lakhe waliqeda. "Ibanga lakhe uhambe waliqeda emculweni njengoba aze washiya yena esethanda. Sisacula, wayefika ngisho egula kodwa azinikele kukho konke akwenzayo, ushiye kuleli qembu esekhulile. Ngiyabonga kinina bafana bakwaMshengu ngokugcina iqembu liphila kangaka, nize ningavumi ukuthi  life," kusho yena. AMALUNGU eMambazo enkonzweni yokukhumbula  u-Albert Mazibuko eThekwini izolo Image: Doctor Ngcobo/Independent Media Indodana kaMazibuko uNhlanhla, nayo ifakazele izikhulumi ebesezikhulume ngaphambi kwayo, yathi uyise ubakhulise ngothando. "Ubaba ubesithumelela amakhadi anemiyalezo nomculo osuka phesheya kwezilwandle. Kuwona wonke amazwe akade ewahambela, ubesithumelela amakhadi akhona esitshela indlela asithanda ngayo. Ubaba bekuthi uma ezofona ocingweni kudala, kushaye ihora lesine ntambama sekunolayini wokulinda ukukhuluma naye, ezositshela ukuthi usithanda kangakanani futhi athi asiziphathe kahle. Lokhu kwakusho kukhulu kithina," kusho uNhlanhla. USibongiseni Tshabalala, uthe kukhulunywe konke ngoMazibuko wathi abakubongayo yisikhathi ababenaso naye, esibe mnandi ebahola njengobaba wabo. Uthe ubaba wabo ngisho bonile, ubengabajezisi ngendlela enzima njengoba yena wabatshela ukuthi wakhula eshaywa ngakho ubehlala nabo ababonise. Uhlelo lwenkonzo beluphethwe wumsakazi woKhozi FM uPhindi P, kanti kunandise amaqembu ahlukene esicathamiya okulindeleke ukuthi aqhubeke nasenkonzweni yomngcwabo. Kube sekubonakala nabacula owokholo okubalwa kubo uSgwili, Ayanda Ntanzi nabanye.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image: Oupa Mokoena/African News Agency(ANA) ULONGWE Twala, usephumele obala wanxusa ukuthi kungenelele uLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuze kuvele iqiniso ngokubulawa kukaSenzo Meyiwa. Usho kanje encwadini ebonwe yiSolezwe, elithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi usanda kuyibhalela unina kaSenzo, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa. Kule ncwadi uLongwe ugcizelela eyokuthi yena akanasandla ekubulaweni kukaSenzo, nakuba kunukwa yena, ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. ULongwe uthe uNkk Meyiwa akazame ukuthola usizo kuMkhwanazi nakuMadlanga ngoba bayahlonishwa ngomsebenzi wabo. “Nginxusa ukuba ucindezele ukuthi ijaji, abameli, amaphoyisa kanjalo noMbuso, bakuvumele ukuthi ulalele inkulumo ephelele eqoshiwe lapho uBongani Ntanzi, egonyuluka khona phambi kweMantshi uVivienne Cronje,” kusho uLongwe. Uqhube wathi uNkk Meyiwa uma eselalela le nkulumo eqoshiwe, kufanele acele ukungayilaleli yedwa kodwa ayilalele noMkhwanazi noMadlanga. “Wena njengonina kaSenzo, kufanele uzizwele ukuthi wayekhuluma ngenkululeko noma wayengaphansi kwengcindezi,” kusho uLongwe. Ngo-Okthoba 2023, iJaji uRatha Mokgoatlheng lanquma ukuthi inkulumo eqoshiwe, ngeke yamukelwe njengobufakazi obuphathekayo enkantolo yomthetho. ULongwe uthe okuqukethwe kule nkulumo, yikho kanye okufanele kulalelwe uNkk Meyiwa, wathi kubalulekile ukuthi athole ubulungiswa ngokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. Ubuye wasola kakhulu umfowabo kaSenzo, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa kanjalo nabanye ngokuthi uma uNkk Meyiwa ezoqhubeka abalalele, akahlukene nomuntu ovimbela ubulungiswa ngomufi. Uthe ngesikhathi ijaji linquma ukuthi le nkulumo eqoshiwe ayingalalelwa enkantolo, uSfiso omunye wabantu abakhombisa ukukuthakasela lokho. “Zibuze umbuzo wokuthi uma labo abakukakile, okukhona kubo nendodana yakho, bethi balwela ubulungiswa, kungani bajabula uma ijaji linquma ukuthi ubufakazi obubalulekile kangaka bungamukelwa enkantolo? Kungani abantu abathi balwela ubulungiswa bebhiyozela ukufihlwa kobufakazi?” kusho uLongwe. Ethintwa uSfiso, uthe ubengakaze ayibone noma ezwe ngencwadi. Elinye ilungu lomndeni okuthiwa lihlala nonina kaMeyiwa kodwa elithintwe lingekho ekhaya, lithe nabo bebengakezwa lutho ngale ncwadi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBaby Cele ongomunye wabalingisi abebelingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni, iGenesis ophelayo kusasa kuMzansi Magic SEKUSELE kancane ziphothulwe izinhlelo zomdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis, efinyelela emaphethelweni kusasa. Lo mdlalo obukhonjiswa ngo-7.30, phakathi nesonto nogxile kwezenkolo, ukwengavuselelwanga emidlalweni ekhona kulesi siteshi, iningi layo eqale ngonyaka odlule. NgoFebhuwari umdlalo Ithonga ufinyelele emaphethelweni, okuze kube manje awukho umdlalo ovale isikhala sawo. Kunalokho uMzansi Magic uthathe umdlalo Inimba obukhonjiswa ngo-9 ebusuku, wawehlisela ku-8.30. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi kulo mdlalo, uveze ukuthi kusuka ngoJulayi, kuzoqala umdlalo ozovala isikhala seGenesis, kodwa umdlalo Inimba wona usazoqhubeka nokuba kulesi sikhathi okuso manje njengoba zingekho izindaba ezithinta ukumenyezelwa kwemidlalo emibili. "Ngenyanga ezayo sizomemezela umdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis njengoba iphela manje. Okwamanje umdlalo basematasa nawo, uzoqala ukuqoshwa ngenyanga ezayo bese kuthi ngoJuni maphakathi nawo kumenyezelwe konke ngawo. Yebo iMultichoice ibhekene nobunzima bokubeka isenti phezu kwelinye kodwa kulesi sikhala ngeke kungabi khona mdlalo oba khona. Ngibona sengathi wumdlalo wesithathu ongeke usaba khona," kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi okwamanje kuzoba khona izinhlelo nemidlalo emincane ezongena kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kuqala umdlalo omusha. "Zikhona izinhlelo ezintsha ezizokhonjiswa kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kufika isikhathi somdlalo omusha. Kunzima okwenzeka ngaphakathi kule nkampani ngoba akujwayelekile, konke manje sekumele kuqale eFrance ukuze kube yizikhulu zenkampani iCanal+ ezishoyo ukuthi akuqhutshekwe. Izolambisa amaciko amaningi le nto eyenzekayo njengoba lo mdlalo uphela nje. Kumele ngabe omusha usukhona usuqoshiwe ukuze uqale ngoMsombuluko kodwa konke lokho akwenzekile ngenxa yokushintsha kwesimo sokusebenza," kuchaza umthombo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDANYA Devs ngomunye wabaculi asebemenyezelwe abazonandisa emcimbini walo nyaka woGu Jazz Festival KULINDELEKE ukuthi kube noxhaxha lwemicimbi oluzobe yandulela umcimbi omkhulu woGu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27, kulo nyaka. Le ndumezulu yomcimbi izoba sezinkundleni zemidlalo Ugu Sports & Leisure Centre, ePort Shepstone. Lo mcimbi obuye ngonyaka odlule ngezinhlelo ezimbalwa, kulo nyaka abahleli bawo bathembisa ukubuya ngegiya eliphezulu kunelejwayelekile ngemuva kweminyaka ungekho. USiya Msomi wenkampani weCoolsounds Trading, okunguye ohlela lo mcimbi ngokubambisana noMasipala Ugu, uveze ukuthi akade sebewuqalile owaziwa ngokuthi i-Offramp Experience, uzoqhubeka ukwenza imicimbi eyandulela Ugu, okukhona kuwo imikhuleko, ukuqwala izintaba, ukubona izindawo zokuvakasha, umcimbi wamahlala neminye. "Umcimbi I-Offramp Experience uzoqala ngedili lo mcimbi oyi-gala dinner enkundleni efanayo ngoJuni 25, bese kulandela eminye. Emcimbini la kuzobe kukhulekwa i-Worship Experience, wona uzoba ngoJuni 26. Kuwona kukhona nabaculi abahlukene esizobamemezela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Silindele abantu abangu-3 000 bese kuthi emcimbini we-jazz khona silindele abantu abangu-8 000. Ngayo yonke imicimbi sifisa ukuthi abantu bahlangane ndawonye bajabulele umculo nakho konke esizobe sikuhlelile. Sithi abantu abaphume ngobuningi babo bezojabula nathi. Kanjalo nabaculi be-jazz angeke sibaveze bonke namhlanje. Sihlele ukuthi sibamemezele ngokuhamba kwesikhathi," kuchaza yena. IMeya kaMasipala Ugu, uMnuz Sikhumbuzo Mqadi, ithe ngemicimbi enjengalena baningi abantu abahlomulayo nabathola amathuba omsebenzi, hhayi nje abaculi nabanikazi bamahhotela nezindawo zobumnandi. "Uyabona njengoba umcimbi usumenyezelwe nje, sesizoya emphakathini siyobatshela ngamathuba emisebenzi ezoba khona bese siyanxusa ukuthi abantu bathathe amathuba avelayo. Ngeke kugcine lapho, besinenkinga yamanzi kakhulu ngapha kithi, esingakusho nje ukuthi izinkinga ezifana nalezo seziyalungiseka ngakho azikho izinkinga izivakashi zethu ezizobhekana nazo," kusho yena. Emcimbini we-jazz kuboshelwe abaculi okukhona kubo uNaledi Aphiwe, Mawelele, Siphokazi, Mondli Ngcobo, ilungu leqembu iBlaq Diamond uDanya, inkakha emculweni we-jazz uDon Laka, Ernie Smith, Bongani Nkwanyaka, Mnqobi Yazo, Olefied Khetha. KoDJ kulindeleke uDJ 101 noDJ Muntu.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kuzowashubela amakhansela ngemuva kokhetho AMANDLA azowela koSomlomo bomasipala abazoqhubeka baqaphe ukusebenza kwemikhandlu, uma kusalindwe ukumenyezelwa ngokusemthethweni kwemiphumela yokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuthi omasipala baqhubeke nokusebenza kusalindwe le miphumela. Ngokomthetho, imiphumela yokhetho kumele imenyezelwe ngemuva kwezinsuku eziyisikhokmbisa, kudlule ukhetho. UMnuz Lance Joel wenhlangano i-South African Local Government Association (Salga), utshele oSomlomo bomasipala baKwaZulu-Natal, emhlanganweni obusesiShayamthetho sesifundazwe eMgungundlovu, ngoLwesihlanu, ukuthi oSomlomo bazoqhubeka nokusebenza kuze kumenyezelwe imiphumela yokhetho. "Ningawubiza ngisho umhlangano wokhetho nangosuku lokhetho. Uma kwenzeka kuhlonzwa isimo senhlekelele ezweni, omasipala kumele baqhubeke nokuhambisa izidingo emphakathini, ngeke ume umsebenzi ngenxa yokuthi kunokhetho," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi ihlandla lobuholi bomasipala kuleli, liphela ngoNovemba 3, 2026. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukhetho lubizwe phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari wangonyaka ozayo. Ngokwezinhlelo ezikhona zokhetho, amalungiselelo okhetho ayaqhubeka phezu kokuba usuku lungakamenyezelwa. UNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezindaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uMengameli we-IFP, nguyena onamandla okumemezela usuku lokhetho. UJoel uthe okunye abakulungiselelayo wukuxoxa nawo wonke amakhansela ukuwalungiselela ukuthi abhekane nesimo uma engabuyeli ezikhundleni. "Inqwaba yamakhansela angeke abuyele ezikhundleni zawo ngemuva kokhetho. Siyawalungiselela, kahle kahle sixoxa nawo wonke ukuze azilungiselele ukuthi kungenzeka angabuyi ngemuva kokhetho. Amanye awo kawazoba neholo ngoba azobe engasatohozi ngakho kumele akulungele lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe kunabanye abasebenzi komasipala, izinkontileka zabo ezincike ezikhulwini zemikhandlu, abangeke babuye ngemuva kokhetho. "Yizona zonke izinto okumele zihlelelwe kusenesikhathi. Kunemibiko okumele yenziwe ngezinhlelo ezenziwe abaholi abakhona komasipala, ezodluliselwa ebuholini obuzongena ngemuva kokhetho," kusho uJoel. Uthe umhlangano wokuqala womasipala kumele uhlale ezinsukwini ezingu-14, ngemuva kokumenyezelwa kwemiphumela yokhetho. Ayisalanga indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali emawadini abo, bayovota kwamanye amawadi uma kunokhetho lokuchibiyela. Ihlale iyindaba egudwini emaqenjini ezombusazwe indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali kuleyo ndawo, bayovota kwenye indawo uma kunalolu khetho. Isikhulu sekhomishini yezokhetho esifundazweni, uDkt Khulekani Zulu, sithe ngaphambi kokhetho badedela uhlu lwabavoti kuleyo ndawo ukuze amaqembu akwazi ukukhalaza uma kukhona angakuboni kahle. "Amaqembu analo ilungelo lokufaka isikhalazo ukuze sisibheke siyikhomishini uma kukhona abantu abangahlali kuleyo wadi. Kumele alethe nobufakazi balokhu ukuze sikwazi ukuphenya," kusho uZulu. Kuvele ukuthi ngo-Agasti, amaqembu kumele aqale uhlelo lokuqoka azofolosa ngabo okhethweni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Abongile Ginya KUHLWE emini kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ngesikhathi egwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele. UMalema ulahlwe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Isinqumo sikhishwe iNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London. IMantshi Twanet Oliver iphinde yagweba uMalema iminyaka emibili ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuphula imithetho elawula ukuphathwa kwezibhamu. Lezigwebo uzozidonsa ngesikhathi esisodwa. UMalema uphinde wahlawuliswa o-R20 000 noma isigwebo sezinyanga eziyisithupha ebhadla ejele kwamanye amacala amathathu amlahlile. Inkantolo inqume ukuthi uMalema aphucwe igunya lokuphatha isibhamu. UMalema ufake isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. UMalema waqhumisa isibhamu ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokubungaza iminyaka eyishumi kwasungulwa i-EFF.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers UBUYELA enkantolo umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, lapho kuzoqhubeka khona icala lakhe lokuqhumisa isibhamu. UMalema uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London, ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine, lapho kuzokwenziwa izethulo ezandulela isigwebo. Ukulalelwa kwezethulo kwahlehliswa ngoJanuwari. UMalema walahlwa yicala lokuqhumisa isibhamu ngonyaka owedlule. Wavulelwa icala emva kokuba kusabalale i-video emkhombisa eqhumisa isibhamu, emcimbini wokugubha iminyaka kwasungulwa i-EFF. Umcimbi aqhumisa kuwo isibhamu wawuseMdantshane, ngo-2018. UMalema uveze ukuthi uMbuso ufuna ukuthi agwetshwe iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ngeledlule. Uthe sekumcacele ukuthi kukhona umuntu ofuna ukumbona ebhadla ejele. "Uyabona ukuthi uMbuso uyangicindezela. Bathi bafuna ngigwetshwe iminyaka engu-15. Abameli bami bazophikisana nalesi sigwebo abasifunayo kodwa into ecacile ukuthi bangifuna ejele. Anginankinga nokuthi kube khona abafuna ukungibona ngisejele." UMalema usengcupheni yokulahlekelwa isikhundla sokuba yilungu lePhalamende, uma egcine enikwe isigwebo esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ebhadla ejele. Umthetho awubavumeli asebeke bagwetshwa isikhathi esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ukuba babe amalungu ePhalamende. Ukugwetshwa kukaMalema ukuba abhadle ejele, kungaphazamisa umkhankaso weqembu wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. Amalungu e-EFF kulindeleke ukuthi abhikishe ngaphandle kwenkantolo ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine. Inkantolo kulindeleke ukuthi imemezele usuku lokukhishwa kwesigwebo uma uMbuso nabameli bakaMalema sebeqede ukwenza izethulo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uMnuz Sanele Thembani UYISE wowesilisa waseWaterloo, eVerulam, owadutshulwa wabulawa yiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku engenze lutho ngo-Agasti 2023, useveze ukuthi sekuzokwehla nobuthongo emuva kwesigwebo esitholwe yimantshi yesifunda. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi ngoLwesithathu, iNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini, igixabeze ngeminyaka ngu-45 ebhadla ejele uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), owayeyiphoyisa lomkhandlu ngesikhathi enza icala. Ubethweswe amacala amathathu okukhona kuwo elokubulala kanjalo namabili okuzama ukubulala. Ngosuku lwesigameko, uGumbi kuthiwa wadubula uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) emgwaqweni u-M4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North. Ngokombiko wamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzomuhle Thembani, uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi ekugcineni umuntu owabulala indodana yakhe ngaphandle kwesizathu, ajeziswe. “Sengizoke ngilale nobuthongo ngazi ukuthi nakuba ingane yami ingeke isavuka kodwa nomuntu owayibulala naye uvalelwe eziseleni ezimnyama. Ngizothi noma ngimcabanga umntanami, ngiduduzwe ukuthi naye umenzi wobubi usezikhindini,” kusho uThembani. Uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi uGumbi agcine egwetshiwe ngoba ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, ubekhombisa ukudelela futhi enethemba lokuthi uzophunyula ngoba eyiphoyisa. Uqhube wathi neminyaka anikwe yona bajabule ngayo ngoba uthe uma embalela, wabona ukuthi uyophuma ejele eseyinganekwane. “Ngiyazi ukuthi kungenzeka angayihlali yonke iminyaka engu-45 kodwa ngiyazi ukuthi uyophuma eseyinto ongayazi,” kusho uThembani. Uthe uGumbi ugwetshwa nje, yena ubengasalubhadi enkantolo, esededela amanye amalungu omndeni ukuthi aqhubeke nokuthamela icala. “Bengivele ngikhushukelwe umoya ngibe yinqaba, ikakhulukazi uma esekhuluma into ekhombisayo ukuthi akazisoli ngokubulala ingane yami futhi ezama ukuzithethelela,” usho kanje. Uthe bekungamkhathazi ukuhamba ngonyawo lonwabu kwalo icala ngoba abaphenyi be- Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID), babebathembisile ukuthi nakanjani lizomgojela ekugcineni. Uthe nemantshi ebilengamele icala iliphathe ngesinono, wathi ubezwa uma bembikela akade beyile ukuthi belungafakwa. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi ibulawa indodana yakhe, yase iphothule izifundo zazenyuvesi, isimatasa nokuthola izincwadi zokushayela. “Ubulawa nje, wayesethole ngisho nosuku ayezoyohlolwa ngalo ukuze athole izincwadi zokushayela. Lawo maphepha ngisawabekile namanje emotweni yami, akuvumi ngiwalahle,” kusho uThembani, othe njalo uma eke wawabheka lawo maphepha, izinyembezi zivele zigcwale amehlo. Ngesikhathi imgweba imantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe ithumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi amaphoyisa akufanele asebenzise igunya lawo lobuphoyisa ukwenza okungafanele. Isole uGumbi ngokubulala umuntu owayengenze lutho, ngoba edinwa ukuthi umnikazi wemoto akamgqizanga qakala ekubeni ewumuntu womthetho.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kuqwashiswa ngobungozi bokuphazanyiswa okuthile ube ushayela nokungadala izingozi zomgwaqo U-EPHRELI uphawulwa njengenyanga yokuqwashisa abantu ngobungozi bokushayela kukhona okubaphazamisayo, nokuyinto okuthiwa ingenye yezimbangela ezinkulu zezingozi emgwaqweni. Isikhulu senkampani efundisa ukushayela futhi egqugquzela ukuphepha emgwaqweni iMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, sithe imininingwane yezinkampani zemishwalense ikhomba ukuthi ukushayela bese kuba nokukuphazamisayo kwenyusa amathuba okushayisa ngo-60%. “Ngokwe-World Health Organisation, ukusebenzisa iselula ube ushayela kunyusa amathuba okushayisa ngokuphindwe kane. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuyibamba ngesandla nokusebenzisa iBluetooth. ENingizimu Afrika, iRoad Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) ihlale ibalula ukuphazamiseka komshayeli njengokuphambili ezingozini okufa kuzo abantu. Kunzima ukuthola ulwazi oluqondile ngoba emuva kwengozi akulula ukusho kugcwale umlomo ukuthi ingozi idalwe wumshayeli obephazamisekile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe ucwaningo lososayensi luthi kunzima ukuthi unganaka ngokugcwele izinto ezimbili kanye kanye. Kunalokho umqondo ulokhu ushintsha ngokushesha unaka izinto ozenzayo ngokwahlukana. “Kuleyo mizuzwana unganakile yonke into ingaphuma esandleni. Ngesivinini esingu-120km/h, imoto ihamba ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-33 metres njalo ngomzuzwana. Ukubuka iselula imizuzwana emine kuya kwemihlanu kufana nokuhamba ibanga enkundleni ye-rugby ucimezile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe akuyona iselula kuphela kodwa nakhu okunye:

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: SEKUBIZA imali ethe maxa ukwetha izimoto eNingizimu Afrika kusuka kuqale inyanga Image:  Tumi Pakkies / Independent Newspapers ABASHAYELI bavuke ngoLwesithathu isinyukile intengo kaphethroli nekadizili eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yokunyuka kwekawoyela okudalwe yimpi eqhubeka e-Iran. Ekaphethroli u-93 unleaded no-95 unleaded inyuke ngoR3.06 ilitha. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi eka-50ppm yona yanyuka ngo-R7.51 ilitha. Uhulumeni umemezele ukuthi uphungulele abashayeli umthwalo ngokukwehlisa intela ye-general fuel levy ngoR3 isikhashana kuze kube yinyanga ezayo lapho uzophinde ubuyekeze khona leso sinqumo. Yize kunjalo kodwa intengo yelitha likadizili ibiza imali engaphansi kancane kukaR30. Isikhulu seMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, phambilini sake sakhipha amathiphu angasiza abashayeli ukuthi bonge. Nazi izinto okumele bazenze: Amathayi: Hlala njalo uhlola ukuthi umoya osemathayini uyahambisana yini noshiwo yinkampani eyakha imoto. Lokhu kungenza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-3 kuya ku-5%. Ukunyathela amafutha mawala: Uma unyathela amafutha kahle ushiye isikhala esanele phakathi kwakho nemoto oyilandelayo kusiza ukuthi ungabhreki kungenasidingo uphinde unyathele nokungakusiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-15%. RPMs: Ezimotweni ezishintshwayo, ukushintsha amagiya engakafiki ku-3 000rpm kusiza ukuthi wonge kuphethroli. Ijubane: Uma wehlisa isivinini ngo-20km/h kungasiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-20% Ukushayela budlabha: Lokhu kunciphisa ukonga ngo-15 kuya ku-30% kuthelawayeka no-10 kuya ku-40% esiminyaminyeni lapho uma uphinde usuke khona. Yehlisa umoya uma ushayela. Ukulayisha umthwalo ongenasidingo: Khipha izinto ezingenasidingo emotweni. Ukudumisa imoto ibe imile: Ukudumisa imoto ume imizuzwana engaphezu kwengu-30 kumosha uphethroli. Ama-sensor alawula indlela izimoto zakamuva ezidla ngayo uphethroli, kwenza singabi khona isidingo sokulokhu uyifudumeza.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Umama Joy ukhala ngoxhaso lokuyobukela indebe yomhlaba phesheya UMama Joy uthandazela ukuxoshwa kukaMcKenzie onqaba ukumkhokhela ukubuka iNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke, uGayton McKenzie, uthi uMama Joy akacele umyeni wakhe amkhokhele izindleko zokuyobuka imidlalo yeNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America. UMcKenzie ukusho lokhu ephendula uMama Joy ku-X ethi njengabalandeli kumele bamukele ukuthi ngeke bayibuke iNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba ungqongqoshe nomnyango ngeke ubasize. “Asithandazele ukuthi umongameli asinikeze uNgqongqoshe omusha wezemiDlalo ozothanda abalandeli,” kubhala uMama Joy owaziwa ngokuzifela ngebhola. UMcKenzie uphendule ngokuthi uMama Joy unomyeni. “Akube wuye okhokhela isithandwa sakhe, i-Euro linamandla. Amadoda angamaFrench aziwa ngokutotosa izithandwa zawo, myekele akhokhe Sista Joy,” kusho uMcKenzie. UMama Joy unomyeni waseFrance amteketisa nnngelikaPapa Joy. Ekuqaleni uMama Joy ubebhalele umongameli weFifa uGianni Infantino ethi engathanda ukuyobuka iBafana Bafana ucela noma wubani ozomsiza ngoba uMcKenzie akafuni ukubakhokhela.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ezinye zezinto ezitholakale ngesikhathi kuseshwa iziboshwa Ukubonakala weziboshwa zichanasa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okuhlanganisa ukuvela bukhoma ku-TikTok, nakwezinye izinkundla yikona okuziqhathe nezikaDalawane. Ukuqinisa imizamo yokuqeda ukungeniswa kwezinto ezingafanele ezikhungweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwezimilo ezweni lonke, izikhulu zejele ziphume umkhankaso wokusesha iziboshwa zingazelele. UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo eqhuba umsebenzi ePollmoor, eKapa UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Kuwumkhankaso ohlanganyelwe ohlanganisa i-DCS Emergency Support Team (EST) kanye namalungu ombutho wamaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS), izikhulu zithole izinto ezingekho emthethweni ezihlanganisa omakhalekhukhwini, izidakamizwa, nezikhali ezicijile. Ukutholakala kwalezi zinto kufakazela ukuthi ozikhulu ezikhohlakele ziyaqhubeka nokwenza lula ukushushumbiswa kwalezi zinto ezikhungweni. nke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Kuwumkhankaso ohlanganyelwe ohlanganisa i-DCS Emergency Support Team (EST) kanye namalungu ombutho wamaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS), izikhulu zithole izinto ezingekho emthethweni ezihlanganisa omakhalekhukhwini, izidakamizwa, nezikhali ezicijile. Ukutholakala kwalezi zinto kufakazela ukuthi ozikhulu ezikhohlakele ziyaqhubeka nokwenza lula ukushushumbiswa kwalezi zinto ezikhungweni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Omunye wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo u-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho emhlabeni ALISEKHO emhlabeni ilungu leLadysmith Black Mambazo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, uMnuz Mdletshe Albert Mazibuko, elithathwe ukugula ngeSonto ebusuku. UMazibuko (77), ongomunye wabasunguli beMambazo, ushonele esibhedlela abengeniswe kuso ngenxa yokugula. Yize imininingwane ephelele ingakacaci kodwa imenenja yeqembu uXolani Majozi ikuqinisekisile kwiSolezwe ushona kwakhe. “Yinto eyenzeke ngeSonto ebusuku ngakho ngicela unginikeze isikhashana ngixhumane kahle nomndeni ngithole imininingwane ephelele. Kuphela ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi akasekho,” kusho uMajozi. UMazibuko uthathe umhlalaphansi ngonyaka odlule lapho iqembu lethule khona amalungu amasha okunguGagamela Shabalala noBabuyile Shabalala. Njengamanje iMambazo inomjikelezo phesheya kodwa kulindeleke ukuthi ibuye ngoLwesihlanu.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzogqunywa esitokisini uFannie Nkosi kuze kuqinisekiswe imininingwane yesicelo sakhe sebheyili Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers USergeant Fannie Nkosi uzogqunywa esitokisini kuze kube uMsombuluko, Ephreli 13, kulandela ukuvela kwakhe eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePretoria North ngoLwesibili. UNkosi uboshwe ngoLwesine, ngemuva kokuba amaphoyisa egasele emzini wakhe osePretoria North. Wachitha impelasonto ende etokile. Inkantolo igunyaze isicelo soMbuso sokuhlehlisa ukuze uqinisekise imininingwane ehlobene nesicelo sakhe sebheyili. UNkosi, oyisikhulu esingaphansi kophiko lobugebengu obuhleliwe eGauteng, ungomunye wabantu abethule ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe uthe ukugasela kwabo kuyingxenye yophenyo oluqhubekayo. Iziphathimandla ziphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha nokushaqa ubufakazi emzini kaNkosi, lapho kubikwa ukuthi zishaqe inqwaba yezinto ezingekho emthethweni, okubalwa izibhamu, izinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ibhomu kanye namadokodo asuka eziteshini ezahlukene zamaphoyisa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE womnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi BEVILE ku-500 ngosuku abantu abangeniswa ezibhedlela ezizimele kuleli abakhokhelwa yiGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi uMzamo Buthelezi, ephendula imibuzo yelungu le-EFF ePhalamende. UButhelezi uthe ngosuku i-GEMS yamukela amalungu amasha angu-112. Uthe ikhokha cishe u-R182 milllion njalo ngosuku kanti ongoti bodokotela bakhokhelwa ngosuku u-R27 milion. "Ngosuku i-GEMS ikhokhela izibhedlela ezizimele ngezingane ezingu-60, ezizalwa ngosuku. Zizalwa abantu abasuke besikiwe, abanye basuke bezibelethele. Bangu-593 abangeniswa ezibhedlela nsuku zonke," kusho uButhelezi. Ubechaza ngezinselelo ezibhekene ne-GEMS enyuse imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko. Sisuse umsindo isenzo se-GEMS sokunyusa imali ekuqaleni konyaka, okwenze izinyunyana zabasebenzi zamashela ukwehliswa kwemali. Okwamanje kusaqhubeka izingxoxo zokuzama ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni njengoba i-GEMS ikhale ngokunyuka kwezindleko okuyimbangela yokunyuswa kwemali ekhokhwa amalungu. Okunye i-GEMS ekhale ngakho yinkohlakalo edla lubi, njengoba amanye amalungu elalisa izihlobo zawo ezingeyona ingxenye ye-GEMS, bese kudingeka lesi sikhwama sikhokhe. Izinyunyana zikhale ngokuthi i-GEMS ibuye ingafuni ukukhokha. UButhelezi empendulweni, uthe i-GEMS iyakhokha uma kungukuthi kuyahambisana nemigomo ebekiwe ethinta ezempilo. "Uma kwenzeka i-GEMS inqaba ukukhokha, kusuke kufaka izinto ezehlukene okubalwa ukusebenzisa izibhedlela ezingeyona ingxenye yezikhungo ezikhokhelwa yilesi sikhwama. Kokunye kusuke kungazange kutholakale imvume ngaphambi kokuba ogulayo angeniswe esibhedlela." Uthe kokunye kusuke kunemininingwane engaphelele noma ezinye izinto okumele zikhokhelwe ezisuke zingekho ngaphansi ezikhavwe yilesi sikhwama. Uveze nokuthi nyakenye, i-GEMS ikhokhele izindleko ezibalelwa ku-R67 billion, ekubeni amalungu akhokha u-R65 billion. Ubalule nokuthi abalesi sikhwama basebenzisa u-R10 billion, ukukhava izindleko ukuze imali ezokhokhwa amalungu inganyuswa kakhulu. UButhelezi uthe ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo phakathi kwezinyunyana ezingaphansi komfelandawonye iCosatu neFedusa, ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Zimkhalele usgaxabhande osolwa ngokuthatha ngozwane izigidi zombutho Amaphoyisa ophiko olulwa nenkohlakalo abophe uKapteni oneminyaka engu-53 ubudala ngecala lokukhwabanisa. Ukuboshwa kwakhe kuvela ophenyweni lwangaphakathi olugunyazwe Uphiko lwezokuphathwa kwemali, kulandela ukuthengiselana okusolisayo ohlelweni lwe-POLFIN. Lo kaputeni usebenzela uphiko lwezezimali lwe-Protection and Security Service (PSS) kusolwa ukuthi lasebenzisa isikhundla salo ukuze likhiphe imali efinyelela ezigidini. Uphenyo seluthole ukuthi wasebenzisa Lesi sikhundla ukuze azibekele yena ukheshi ecasha ngokuthi le mali yayihloselwe izindleko zokuhamba zabavikeli abasebenza nabangaphansi kwePresidential Protection Services (PPS). Olunye uphenyo luthole ukuthi imali ayitholwanga ngabavikeli, kodwa wayeyikhipha yena iyisamba semali. Ngemuva kophenyo oluthathe isikhathi eside, kubhaliswe icala lokukhwabanisa esiteshini samaphoyisa eSunnyside kanti uphenyo lwangaphakathi lomnyango seluholele ekutheni amiswe. Lo kaputeni uzovela ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026, ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yasePitoli ngecala lokukhwabanisa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ZIMI ngomumo izinhlaka ezibhekele ukuphepha eNingizimu Afrika uma kwenzeka kuqubuka izibhelu ezifuze ezenzeka ngoJulayi 2021. IPhini likaMengameli lezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile, liveze ukuthi ngeke kuwuphinde uhulumeni okwenzeka ngo-2021, lapho izinhlaka zokuphepha zazingalindele ukuthi kungase kuqubuke izibhelu, ezakhahlameza kakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Lezi zibhelu ezathatha cishe isonto lonke, zacekela phansi impahla yezitolo namafemu kuleli, kutatshwa impahla kwaphinde kwashiswa ngenxa yokuthi kukhona ababezwelana nokuboshwa kowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, osengumholi weqembu iMKP. "Zafika singalindele izibhelu zango-2021. Ezobunhloli zazingekho ezingeni kodwa manje mkhulu umehluko okhona. Silindele noma yini, siyokwazi futhi ukusheshe siyihlonze ingozi ngoba ukhona umnyakazo owenziwe nangasohlangothini lwezobunhloli kuleli," kusho uMashatile ephendula imibuzo yamalungu ePhalamende, izolo. Bevile ku-300 abantu abashona kulezi zibhelu, kwaboshwa abevile ku-5 000, kwadaleka umonakalo wezigidigidi zamarandi emnothweni. Umholi weBosa, uDkt Mmusi Maimane, ukhale ngokushoda kwamaphoyisa, wathi abantu abaphephile ekubeni eqhethe ePhalamende. "Kungani amaphoyisa engayi kovikela abantu kodwa agcwele la ePhalamende?" UMashatile uthe iPhalamende lashiswa ngakho abafuni kuphinde lesi sehlo futhi ngomuso. "Uma kunomengameli wezwe kudingeka kuqiniswe ezokuphepha. Ukhona umnyakazo wokuqasha amaphoyisa ukuze aqaphe ubugebengu kuleli. Sikhathazekile ngobugebengu obunendlakadla kuleli," usho kanje. Uveze ukubaluleka kokubambisana uma kuzoliwa ngempumelelo nobugebengu kuleli. "Phambilini. bekukhona amakomiti okulwa nobugebengu emphakathini. Abesiza kakhulu kule nkinga ngoba umphakathi iwona owazi ukusuka nokuhlala kobugebengu. Ngezinye zezinto okudingeka sizibuyise ukulwa nobugebengu." Uthe nezobulungiswa kumele zibe yingxenye empini yobugebengu ukuze kungaboshwa umuntu manje kusasa useyadedelwa.
